# JSPrep Pro — JavaScript Interview Preparation
# https://jsprep.pro
# llms.txt — machine-readable index for AI crawlers and LLMs
# Format: emerging standard at llmstxt.org
# Last updated: 2025-03-10

> JSPrep Pro is a JavaScript interview preparation platform with 150+ practice questions, 35 concept hubs with deep explanations, output prediction challenges, debug exercises, and blog articles. Designed for developers preparing for frontend and full-stack JavaScript interviews.

## Platform Overview

- Homepage: https://jsprep.pro
- All Topics: https://jsprep.pro/topics
- Blog: https://jsprep.pro/blog
- Practice Questions by Category: https://jsprep.pro/questions

## Concept Hubs (Deep Explanations + Interview Questions)

Each concept hub contains: a mental model analogy, deep code explanation, common misconceptions, real-world framework examples, and 10-25 practice questions.

- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-closure-interview-questions — JavaScript Closures: lexical scope, closure patterns, memory, private state
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-hoisting-interview-questions — JavaScript Hoisting: var/let/const hoisting, TDZ, function declaration hoisting
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-scope-interview-questions — JavaScript Scope: lexical scope, scope chain, block vs function scope, module scope
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-var-let-const-interview-questions — var vs let vs const: scoping rules, hoisting differences, TDZ, when to use each
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-execution-context-interview-questions — Execution Context: call stack, global context, function context, creation vs execution phase
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-type-coercion-interview-questions — Type Coercion: implicit vs explicit, == coercion rules, truthy/falsy
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-equality-interview-questions — Equality (== vs ===): strict equality, loose equality coercion rules, Object.is
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-this-keyword-interview-questions — this Keyword: 5 binding rules, call/apply/bind, arrow functions, class context
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-arrow-function-interview-questions — Arrow Functions: lexical this, differences from regular functions, when not to use
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-currying-interview-questions — Currying: partial application, function composition, practical use cases
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-higher-order-functions-interview-questions — Higher-Order Functions: map/filter/reduce, function composition, callbacks
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-generators-interview-questions — Generators: function*, yield, iterator protocol, async generators, use cases
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-event-loop-interview-questions — Event Loop: call stack, microtask queue, macrotask queue, execution order
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-promise-interview-questions — Promises: states, chaining, Promise.all/allSettled/race/any, error handling
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-async-await-interview-questions — Async/Await: async functions, await mechanics, parallel vs sequential, error handling
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-callback-interview-questions — Callbacks: synchronous vs async callbacks, callback hell, error-first convention
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-settimeout-interview-questions — setTimeout: timer mechanics, 0ms delay, macrotask queue, debounce patterns
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-prototype-interview-questions — Prototypes: prototype chain, constructor functions, new keyword, Object.create, classes
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-object-interview-questions — Objects: property descriptors, Object.freeze/seal, structuredClone, optional chaining
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-class-interview-questions — Classes: ES6 class syntax, private fields, static methods, inheritance, super
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-array-interview-questions — Arrays: map/filter/reduce, sort gotchas, flat/flatMap, mutating vs non-mutating methods
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-destructuring-interview-questions — Destructuring: object/array destructuring, defaults, renaming, nested, function params
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-spread-rest-interview-questions — Spread and Rest: ...spread vs ...rest, object spread, conditional spread patterns
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-map-set-interview-questions — Map and Set: Map vs Object, Set operations, WeakMap/WeakSet, O(1) lookup
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-proxy-reflect-interview-questions — Proxy and Reflect: traps, validation, reactivity, revocable proxies, Reflect methods
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-modules-interview-questions — JavaScript Modules: ES modules, CommonJS, dynamic import, tree shaking, circular deps
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-iterator-interview-questions — Iterators: iterator protocol, Symbol.iterator, custom iterables, for...of
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-error-handling-interview-questions — Error Handling: Error types, custom errors, try/catch/finally, async error handling
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-performance-interview-questions — JavaScript Performance: layout thrashing, debounce/throttle, memoization, V8 optimization
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-debounce-throttle-interview-questions — Debounce and Throttle: implementation, use cases, requestAnimationFrame
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-memory-management-interview-questions — Memory Management: garbage collection, memory leaks, WeakRef, heap profiling
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-dom-interview-questions — DOM: DOM tree, querying, event delegation, layout thrashing, MutationObserver
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-browser-apis-interview-questions — Browser APIs: fetch, storage APIs, Web Workers, IntersectionObserver, Permissions API
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-immutability-interview-questions — Immutability: Object.freeze, structuredClone, Immer, immutable update patterns
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-regex-interview-questions — Regular Expressions: regex syntax, flags, groups, lookahead, common patterns
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-event-propagation-interview-questions - javascript event propagation: bubbling, capturing implementation, use cases
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-memoization-interview-questions - javascript memoization: LRU, weak map, weak set
- https://jsprep.pro/javascript-design-pattern-interview-questions - javascript design pattern, factory

## Practice Question Sets (by category)

- https://jsprep.pro/questions/closures — Closure questions
- https://jsprep.pro/questions/async-js — Async JS questions (Promises, async/await, callbacks)
- https://jsprep.pro/questions/this-keyword — this keyword questions
- https://jsprep.pro/questions/prototypes — Prototype and class questions
- https://jsprep.pro/questions/scope — Scope and hoisting questions
- https://jsprep.pro/questions/core-js — Core JavaScript questions
- https://jsprep.pro/questions/arrays — Array method questions
- https://jsprep.pro/questions/objects — Object and class questions
- https://jsprep.pro/questions/performance — Performance questions
- https://jsprep.pro/questions/modern-js — ES6+ questions

## Blog Articles

- https://jsprep.pro/blog/top-50-javascript-interview-questions — Top 50 JavaScript Interview Questions with deep answers
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-promises-async-await — JavaScript Promises and Async/Await complete guide
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-output-questions — 30 JavaScript output questions with explanations
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-closures-interview — JavaScript Closures: mental model and interview patterns
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-event-loop-explained — JavaScript Event Loop: call stack, microtasks, macrotasks
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-hoisting-explained — JavaScript Hoisting: what moves, what doesn't
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-scope-explained — JavaScript Scope: lexical scope and scope chain
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-modern-es6-features — Modern JavaScript ES6 through ES2024 features
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-error-handling-guide — JavaScript Error Handling complete guide
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-performance-optimization — JavaScript Performance Optimization guide
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-prototypes-explained — JavaScript Prototypes: the object model explained
- https://jsprep.pro/blog/javascript-this-keyword-explained — JavaScript this keyword: five rules explained

## About This Resource

JSPrep Pro covers every major JavaScript interview topic with original explanations, not copied content. Questions are categorized as Theory, Output Prediction, and Debug challenges, polyfill questions. Content is regularly updated to reflect modern JavaScript (ES2024).

Target audience: JavaScript developers preparing for frontend, full-stack, or Node.js engineering interviews at any level from junior to senior.
